variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list misses the clearest overhead component 'Payroll Expenses'. The populated candidate 'Other Operating Expenses' appears to equal total operating expense in recent years, which is a subtotal and should not be used alone. I therefore selected component-style rows from the full preview, but manual review is needed because 'Other Operating Expenses' appears twice and one occurrence may still function as a subtotal in some years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll Expenses, [Income Statement] Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, [Income Statement] Acquisition Cost of Group Companies, [Income Statement] Restructuring Charges & Provisions
